creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
When PR 31626 was commited, the following files were not removed
	from the port:

	    Removed Files:
	        pkg-message.bsdi
	        pkg-message.freebsd
	        files/change_server.alpha
	        files/change_server.bsdi
	        files/fp_install.alpha
	        files/fp_install.bsdi
	        files/patch-fa
	        files/patch-fb
	        files/patch-fk
	        files/patch-fn

	This will cause the port to fail when patching files.

Fix: 

Remove the above listed files.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try a make patch
